reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied when a checked-in evidence bundle records direct or verified proof for the claim boundary.

claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by the checked-in scenario-catalog evidence bundle: `cautilus scenarios --json` returns three normalization families and each has a non-empty `exampleInputCli`; focused CLI tests require that field on every catalog family.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered by scenario catalog CLI tests when adding or changing normalization families.
